titles.title: Something Good Is Going to Happen to You

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Right there in the dust, he sat by the gate, To listen to footsteps and patiently wait. The blind man just didn't dream that this was the day That Jesus of Nazareth would pass by his way.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Something good is going to happen to you Happen to you this very day. Something good is going to happen to you Jesus of Nazareth is passing your way.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: She stood by the well, so tired and alone, Misfortune and heartache was all she had known, She looked at the stranger, but who would ever think, 'Twas Jesus to offer her living water to drink.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: They were only wee children so happy at play And told to stay quiet and out of the way; But then came the Saviour with arms open wide, They're part of His kingdom, make room by His side.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: My friend if you're listening now humbly to me Yes this is the moment that you can be free This very same Jesus is right here today; Release your faith and touch Him, then believe me when I say
